completedorder.description: This table contains transaction details including order ID, account IDs of sender and receiver, transaction amount, and payment category.

CRM_Events.description: This table contains consumer complaints data related to various financial products and services, including details such as the date received, product type, issue, consumer complaint narrative, and company response.

completeddisposition.description: This table tracks the relationship between clients, accounts, and their corresponding roles (Owner or User) within the system.

completedcard.description: This table contains information about credit card transactions, including the card ID, disposition ID, card type, and transaction date.

LuxuryLoanPortfolio.description: This table contains information about loans, including loan details, borrower information, property details, employment information, and building characteristics.

CRM_Call_Center_Logs.description: This table contains information about customer complaints received, including details such as complaint ID, client ID, phone number, call details, priority, type, outcome, and server information.

completedloan.description: This table contains information about loans, including loan ID, account ID, loan amount, duration, monthly payments, status, date details, location, and purpose of the loan.

completeddistrict.description: This table provides information on cities in the United States, including their district ID, city name, state name, state abbreviation, region, and division.

completedtrans.description: This table contains transaction details including transaction ID, account ID, type of transaction, operation, amount, balance, and date/time information for each transaction.

CRM_Reviews.description: This table contains data on customer reviews for a mortgage company, including the date of the review, star rating, review text, product mentioned, and district ID associated with the review.

completedacct.description: This table contains data on account IDs, district IDs, frequency of issuance, parsed dates, and year, month, and day information.

completedclient.description: This table contains personal information about clients, including their ID, sex, date of birth, age, contact details, and address.
